column1: SOA-C02,"Domain 6: Cost & Performance Optimization","Cost & Performance Optimization","## SOA-C02 Domain 6: Cost & Performance Optimization
This domain covers implementing cost optimization strategies and performance monitoring for AWS workloads.

column3: View spending by service, account, tag
Idle instances, unattached EBS, unused EIPs
Open security groups, MFA on root, public S3
No Multi-AZ, no backups, ASG single-AZ

column1: - Business/Enterprise: All checks + API access + CloudWatch integration
- Enhanced recommendations with paid metrics (up to 3 months history)
- **Spot Fleet:** Mix of instance types and AZs for availability
- **Spot Block:** Reserved Spot for 1-6 hours (being deprecated)
- **Diversification:** Request multiple instance types to reduce interruption
- **Best for:** Batch, CI/CD, data analysis, stateless web servers, HPC
- **Instance Scheduler:** Start/stop EC2 and RDS on schedule
- **ASG Scheduled Scaling:** Scale to zero at night
- Savings: 50-70% for dev/test environments (run 10 hrs/day, 5 days/week)
- Stop instances when not in use (max 7 days, then auto-starts)
- Use Aurora Serverless for dev/test (scales to zero)

column3: Scale up (larger instance) or scale out (more instances)
Use io2/gp3 with higher IOPS, or Instance Store
Enhanced Networking, Placement Group, larger instance

column1: - OS-level metrics (CPU per process, memory breakdown)
- Extra cost but essential for deep RDS troubleshooting
- Enable Cost Allocation Tags in Billing console
- Enforce with SCPs (deny untagged resource creation)
- **""Alert when budget exceeded""** -> AWS Budgets (with actions)
- **""Track costs by team""** -> Cost Allocation Tags + Cost Explorer
- **""Steady-state, predictable""** -> Savings Plans or Reserved Instances
- **""Find optimal transition timing""** -> S3 Storage Class Analysis
- **""Reduce EBS cost""** -> Delete unattached, use gp3, archive snapshots
- **""Monitor memory on EC2""** -> CloudWatch Agent (custom metric)
- **""Reduce global latency""** -> CloudFront + Route 53 Latency routing
- **Compute Optimizer** uses ML on 14 days of CloudWatch data to recommend instance types.
- **Trusted Advisor** requires Business or Enterprise support for all checks (Basic = 7 security only).
- **AWS Budgets** can take automated actions (apply IAM policy, stop instances) when threshold hit.
- **Cost Allocation Tags** must be activated in Billing console before they appear in Cost Explorer.
- **Savings Plans** are more flexible than Reserved Instances. Compute SP works across all compute.
- **Spot Instances** give 2-minute interruption warning. Always design for fault tolerance.
- **Instance Scheduler** can save 50-70% on dev/test by stopping instances outside business hours.
- **S3 Intelligent-Tiering** has no retrieval fees. Best when you don't know access patterns.
- **S3 Storage Class Analysis** helps determine when to transition objects (observes access patterns).
- **EBS Snapshot Archive** is 75% cheaper than standard snapshots (24-72 hour restore time).
- **gp3** is 20% cheaper than gp2 with the same baseline performance. Always prefer gp3.
- **Enhanced Monitoring (RDS)** provides per-process OS metrics at 1-second granularity.
- **Performance Insights** identifies which SQL queries are causing RDS bottlenecks.
- **Tag everything.** Without tags, cost allocation and governance are impossible at scale."
